snippet: Pilkerton Realtors is a full-service residential real estate brokerage serving clients in the emerging, established, and luxury neighborhoods in Middle Tennessee .
personalized_line: I came across Pilkerton Realtors in Nashville while looking for Tennessee broker leadership teams, and your platform appears active in A Nashville real estate tradition since 1969.
subject: Peregrine Realty Group / Principal Broker Opportunity
body:
Hi Pilkerton Realtors team,

I came across Pilkerton Realtors in Nashville while looking for Tennessee broker leadership teams, and your platform appears active in A Nashville real estate tradition since 1969.

I'm building Peregrine Realty Group around a live distress-origination and controlled deal-flow system, and I'm looking for the right principal broker relationship to structure the brokerage side correctly from the beginning.

The underlying origination engine and partner-facing distribution layer already exist. What I'm looking for now is the right principal broker and office home to serve as the appointed principal broker, host the brokerage under an established office/location, oversee brokerage compliance and supervision as required, and help ensure the operation is structured correctly from a regulatory and operational standpoint.

This is not meant to be a passive license arrangement. I want the brokerage built on a real supervisory and compliance foundation.

On economics, I'm open to structuring it the right way for the right fit, but the basic framework would be principal broker oversight and hosting, plus revenue share tied to brokerage-side deal flow generated through Peregrine.

If this is something you'd be open to discussing, I'd value a short conversation.

Best,
Patrick Yuri Armour
FALCO
https://falco.llc
query: Tennessee broker owner real estate company Nashville Franklin
